mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, UP_DEPT_CD, DEPT_TYPE_CD, DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, DEPT_NM, DEPT_LOC, DEPT_TEL, DEL_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM DEPT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DEPT_CD

SELECT e.EMP_NO AS empNo, e.EMP_NM AS empNm, e.DEPT_CD AS deptCd, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, p.POS_NM AS posNm FROM EMP e LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD ORDER BY d.DEPT_NM, p.POS_LVL, e.EMP_NM

SELECT e.EMP_NO AS empNo, e.EMP_NM AS empNm, e.DEPT_CD AS deptCd, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, p.POS_NM AS posNm FROM EMP e LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE e.EMP_NO = #{empNo}

SELECT r.RSPNS_NO AS rspnsNo, r.TEST_NO AS testNo, tm.TEST_NM AS testNm,
r.RSPNR_EMP_NO AS rspnrEmpNo, er.EMP_NM AS rspnrEmpNm, dr.DEPT_NM AS rspnrDeptNm, pr.POS_NM AS rspnrPosNm,
r.TRGT_EMP_NO AS trgtEmpNo, et.EMP_NM AS trgtEmpNm, dt.DEPT_NM AS trgtDeptNm, pt.POS_NM AS trgtPosNm,
r.RSPNS_DTM AS rspnsDtm, r.ACTN_TYPE_RSLT AS actnTypeRslt FROM RSPNS r JOIN TEST_MST tm ON tm.TEST_NO = r.TEST_NO
LEFT JOIN EMP er ON er.EMP_NO = r.RSPNR_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dr ON dr.DEPT_CD = er.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pr ON pr.POS_CD = er.POS_CD
LEFT JOIN EMP et ON et.EMP_NO = r.TRGT_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dt ON dt.DEPT_CD = et.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pt ON pt.POS_CD = et.POS_CD WHERE r.TRGT_EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND r.RSPNS_DTM >= #{startDate} AND r.RSPNS_DTM < #{endDate}
AND r.TEST_NO = #{testNo}
ORDER BY r.RSPNS_DTM DESC, r.RSPNS_NO DESC

SELECT r.RSPNS_NO AS rspnsNo, r.TEST_NO AS testNo, tm.TEST_NM AS testNm, tm.TEST_DESC AS testDesc,
r.RSPNR_EMP_NO AS rspnrEmpNo, er.EMP_NM AS rspnrEmpNm, dr.DEPT_NM AS rspnrDeptNm, pr.POS_NM AS rspnrPosNm,
r.TRGT_EMP_NO AS trgtEmpNo, et.EMP_NM AS trgtEmpNm, dt.DEPT_NM AS trgtDeptNm, pt.POS_NM AS trgtPosNm,
r.RSPNS_DTM AS rspnsDtm, r.ACTN_TYPE_RSLT AS actnTypeRslt FROM RSPNS r JOIN TEST_MST tm ON tm.TEST_NO = r.TEST_NO
LEFT JOIN EMP er ON er.EMP_NO = r.RSPNR_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dr ON dr.DEPT_CD = er.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pr ON pr.POS_CD = er.POS_CD
LEFT JOIN EMP et ON et.EMP_NO = r.TRGT_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dt ON dt.DEPT_CD = et.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pt ON pt.POS_CD = et.POS_CD WHERE r.RSPNS_NO = #{rspnsNo}

SELECT bt.TYPE_NO AS typeNo, bt.TEST_NO AS testNo, bt.TYPE_CD AS typeCd, bt.TYPE_NM AS typeNm, bt.TYPE_CN AS typeCn FROM RSPNS r JOIN BEHAVIOR_TYPE bt ON bt.TEST_NO = r.TEST_NO AND bt.TYPE_CD = r.ACTN_TYPE_RSLT WHERE r.RSPNS_NO = #{rspnsNo}
SELECT bt.TYPE_NO AS typeNo, bt.TEST_NO AS testNo, bt.TYPE_CD AS typeCd, bt.TYPE_NM AS typeNm, bt.TYPE_CN AS typeCn FROM BEHAVIOR_TYPE bt WHERE bt.TEST_NO = #{testNo} AND bt.TYPE_CD = #{typeCd}

SELECT q.QST_NO AS qstNo, q.QST_NM AS qstNm, qi.ITEM_NO AS itemNo, qi.ITEM_CN AS itemCn, qi.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, rr.RSPNS_VAL AS rspnsVal FROM RSPNS_RSLT rr JOIN QUESTION_ITEM qi ON qi.ITEM_NO = rr.ITEM_NO JOIN QUESTION q ON q.QST_NO = qi.QST_NO WHERE rr.RSPNS_NO = #{rspnsNo} ORDER BY q.QST_NO, qi.ITEM_NO
